signing.user_warning: Windows may show a Microsoft Defender SmartScreen or unknown-publisher warning because this source-built bundle is not trusted-signed yet. Distribute only after your own review, signing, and release process.

safe_claims: The Windows beta shell uses the desktop FFI runtime lane.
The local release build bundles libcore.dll next to the Flutter runner.
Local packaging can produce an unsigned installer EXE and portable ZIP; do not present them as official or trusted-signed binaries without a separate release process.
blocked_on: trusted Windows signing material is not wired into this lane
trusted installer signing is not implemented
public binary distribution and product cutover remain external
